name: Corny Pasta and Beef Casserole
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large skillet, cook ground beef, onion, and garlic over medium-high heat, stirring frequently until beef is browned about 5 minutes. Drain excess fat.
Stir in tomato soup, water, macaroni, salt, pepper, and cayenne pepper. Bring to a boil, stirring frequently. Reduce heat to low, partially cover, and simmer until macaroni is barely tender (6-8 minutes). Stir in cream-style corn. Pour into a lightly greased 1.5-quart casserole dish and cover tightly.
Bake for 15 minutes. Remove cover and sprinkle cheddar cheese evenly over the top. Bake uncovered for an additional 15 minutes or until casserole is bubbling and cheese is melted.
